string.name: action_check

resources.string: Check
袠蟹斜褉懈褕懈 懈褋褌芯褉懈褬邪 薪邪 锌褉械斜邪褉褍胁邪褮械
袩褉械斜邪褉邪褬 械锌懈蟹芯写懈
袧械屑邪 褉械蟹褍谢褌邪褌懈
袨斜薪芯胁懈 胁芯 薪邪褬薪芯胁邪 胁械褉蟹懈褬邪.
What\'s new
袧械锌芯蟹薪邪褌芯
袧械锌芯蟹薪邪褌芯
袩芯胁褉蟹懈 褋械 薪邪 懈薪褌械褉薪械褌, 锌芯褋谢械 锌褉芯斜邪褬 锌芯胁褌芯褉薪芯.
袧械屑邪 邪锌谢懈泻邪褑懈褬邪 褕褌芯 屑芯卸械 写邪 谐芯 锌芯写写褉卸懈 芯胁邪
袧械 械 胁芯蟹屑芯卸薪芯 写邪 谐懈 锌褉芯屑械薪懈褌懈 锌芯写邪褌芯褑懈褌械.
Try to export your data, re-install and restore
袧械屑芯卸械 写邪 褋械 泻芯薪械泻褌懈褉邪 褋芯 %s. 袩褉芯斜邪褬褌械 锌芯写芯褑薪邪.
袚褉械褕薪懈: %s

小锌芯写械谢懈 褎懈谢屑
袛芯写邪褬 胁芯 泻邪谢械薪写邪褉
袧械 屑芯卸械 写邪 褋械 泻褉械懈褉邪 薪邪褋褌邪薪 胁芯 泻邪谢械薪写邪褉芯褌.
Comments from Trakt
袣芯屑械薪褌邪褉懈
袧邪锌懈褕懈 泻芯屑械薪褌邪褉 (袗薪谐谢懈褋泻懈, 5+ 蟹斜芯褉芯胁懈)

袗卸褍褉懈褉邪褮械…
袟邪 写邪 邪卸褍褉懈褉邪褕 泻芯薪械泻褌懈褉邪褬 褋械 薪邪 懈薪褌械褉薪械褌.
袗卸褍褉懈褉邪褮械褌芯 械 胁芯 锌褉芯谐褉械褋, 锌褉芯斜邪褬褌械 锌芯写芯褑薪邪.

袛芯写邪褬 褋械
小懈褌械 褋械褉懈懈 褱械 褋械 锌褉懈泻邪卸邪褌 胁芯 褌胁芯褬邪褌邪 谢懈褋褌邪 芯写 褋械褉懈懈 蟹邪 泻褉邪褌泻芯.

Movie removed from TMDB. Remove it from lists, set it not watched. Using Trakt? On their website, search for its TMDB ID and remove it from history and lists.

SeriesGuide Cloud helps to back up and sync your shows, lists and movies
While signed in with SeriesGuide Cloud, some Trakt features are disabled and changes are only sent to your Trakt account, not retrieved.
袩褉懈褬邪胁懈 褋械
袨写褬邪胁懈 褋械
袩芯写械褋褍胁邪褮械褌芯 薪邪 SeriesGuide Cloud 薪械 械 蟹邪胁褉褕械薪芯.
Your account does not have an email address
袘褉懈褕械褮械 薪邪 邪泻邪褍薪褌
袣芯褉懈褋薪懈褔泻邪褌邪 褋屑械褌邪 械 锌芯薪懈褕褌械薪邪.
袧械屑芯卸械 写邪 褬邪 懈蟹斜褉懈褕械 泻芯褉懈褋薪懈褔泻邪褌邪 褋屑械褌泻邪.
袨褌褋褌褉邪薪褍胁邪褮械 薪邪 胁邪褕懈芯褌 锌褉芯褎懈谢 褱械 斜懈写邪褌 懈蟹斜褉懈褕邪薪懈 褋懈褌械 械屑懈褋懈懈 懈 褎懈谢屑芯胁懈 芯写 SeriesGuide Cloud. 袘懈写械褌械 褋懈谐褍褉薪懈 写邪 谐芯 芯褌褋褌褉邪薪懈褌械 泻邪泻芯 懈 芯写 写褉褍谐懈褌械 锌芯胁褉蟹邪薪懈 褍褉械写懈.
袠褋锌褉邪褱邪褮械 胁芯 SeriesGuide Cloud.
袨写谢芯谐懈褉邪褬 芯写 SeriesGuide Cloud
Choose email to sign in if you are using SeriesGuide on other devices that do not support Google sign-in.
袠褋锌褉邪褱邪褮械 薪邪 trakt.
袩褉芯胁械褉懈 胁芯 %s 薪邪 trakt.
袨褌泻邪卸邪薪芯 褔械泻懈褉邪褮械 薪邪 trakt.
袟邪屑械薪懈
袙械褱械 褋褌械 锌褉懈褬邪胁械薪懈 胁芯 褍褕褌械 械写薪邪 械锌懈蟹芯写邪 懈谢懈 褎懈谢屑. 袠谢懈 写邪 褬邪 蟹邪屑械薪懈 锌褉械褌褏芯写薪邪褌邪 锌褉芯胁械褉泻邪 懈谢懈 锌芯褔械泻邪褬褌械 %s 懈 芯斜懈写械褌械 褋械 锌芯胁褌芯褉薪芯.
袑械 锌芯褔械泻邪屑
Your Trakt account is locked. Contact Trakt support.
袧械褕褌芯 褌褉谐薪邪 薪邪芯锌邪泻褍. 袩褉芯胁械褉械褌械 褬邪 胁邪褕邪褌邪 trakt 褋屑械褌泻邪 懈 芯斜懈写械褌械 褋械 锌芯胁褌芯褉薪芯.
袧械 械 (褋械褍褕褌械) 写芯褋褌邪锌薪芯 薪邪 trakt. 袩褉芯斜邪褬褌械 锌芯写芯褑薪邪.
袧械 屑芯卸械 (褋械褍褕褌械) 写邪 斜懈写邪褌 褌褉邪泻懈褉邪薪懈 褋芯 trakt.
Can\'t add, Trakt account limit reached.
Can\'t upload, Trakt account limit reached.
To use this, connect to Trakt
袩芯胁褉蟹懈 trakt
袣芯薪械泻褌懈褉邪褬 SeriesGuide 褋芯 trakt
袩褉芯胁械褉懈 谐芯 trakt 锌褉芯褎懈谢芯褌
袦芯屑械薪褌, 袙械 屑芯谢懈屑械…
袣芯薪械泻褌懈褉邪褬
袠褋泻谢褍褔懈
Add shows from Trakt
Trakt 锌芯屑邪谐邪 写邪 胁芯写懈 械胁懈写械薪褑懈褬邪 泻芯褬 孝袙 械屑懈褋懈懈 懈 褎懈谢屑芯胁懈 胁懈械 谐谢械写邪褌械.
What Trakt calls library is called collection in SeriesGuide.
Once connected, add shows from your Trakt account using the Trakt items on the Discover tab.

袧邪锌褉械写薪芯
袟邪
袧械 械屑懈褌褍胁邪薪懈 械锌懈蟹芯写懈
袧懈泻芯谐邪褕 薪械 锌褉懈泻邪卸褍胁邪褬 褋械褉懈懈 泻芯褬 胁械褱械 褋械 锌褉懈泻邪卸褍胁邪邪褌 胁芯 屑芯屑械薪褌芯褌
小芯泻褉懈褬 褋锌械褑懈褬邪谢薪懈 械锌懈蟹芯写懈
小锌械褑懈褬邪谢薪懈褌械 械锌懈蟹芯写懈 懈褋褔械蟹薪邪邪 芯写 褋械泻邪写械 芯褋胁械薪 芯写 谢懈褋褌邪褌邪 褋芯 褋械蟹芯薪懈
袩褉懈泻a卸懈 褌o褔械薪 写a褌褍屑
\"袨泻褌芯屑胁褉懈 31\" 芯褌泻芯谢泻褍 \"胁芯 3 写械薪芯胁懈\"
小锌褉械褔懈 褋锌芯褬谢械褉懈
小芯泻褉懈褬 写械褌邪谢懈 写芯写械泻邪 械锌懈蟹芯写邪褌邪 薪械 械 谐谢械写邪薪邪
袩褉械写锌褉o褔懈褌a薪 褬a蟹懈泻 薪a 褋o写褉卸懈薪a褌a
袗谢褌械褉薪邪褌懈胁械薪 褬邪蟹懈泻
小谢懈泻懈 芯写 Wi-Fi 褋邪屑芯
袛邪 谐懈 薪邪屑邪谢懈 锌芯褌褉芯褕褍胁邪褔泻邪褌邪 薪邪 懈薪褌械褉薪械褌, 薪械 褋懈屑薪褍胁邪褬褌械 锌褉械泻褍 屑芯斜懈谢械薪 懈谢懈 锌褉械泻褍 屑褉械卸懈 泻芯褬 褋械 薪邪锌谢邪褱邪邪褌

resources.string: Privacy Policy
袨胁芯褬 锌褉芯写褍泻褌 泻芯褉懈褋褌懈 TMDB API 薪芯 薪械 械 芯写芯斜褉械薪邪 懈谢懈 谢懈褑械薪褑懈褉邪薪邪 芯写 TMDB.

resources.string: 袠蟹斜褉懈褕懈 谐懈 褋懈褌械 泻械褕懈褉邪薪懈 褋谢懈泻懈 芯写 胁邪褕懈芯褌 褍褉械写
Export and import
Export
Import
Export to file
Include descriptions, details, ratings
Successful
Failed
Can not find or access file
Restore backup
View expected format
Your current shows, lists or movies will be replaced by the imported data
Not recommended when using SeriesGuide Cloud or Trakt
Syncing with Cloud or Trakt may overwrite imported data. With SeriesGuide Cloud, you can delete your account before importing data, then re-create it afterwards to only upload the imported data.
薪械屑邪 芯写斜褉邪薪芯 写邪褌芯褌械泻邪

袟胁褍泻
袙懈斜褉懈褉邪褮械
袠褋褌芯 胁懈斜褉懈褉邪褬 薪邪 薪芯褌懈褎懈泻邪褑懈褬邪 薪邪 写懈褋锌谢械褬芯褌

小械褉懈懈 泻芯懈 懈屑邪邪褌 胁泻谢褍褔械薪芯 薪芯褌懈褎懈泻邪褑懈懈 (%d)
Ignore hidden shows
Even if notifications are enabled, do not notify about hidden shows
袚褉械褕泻邪
Only for episodes to watch next
Only notify if the new episode is the next one to watch
Battery settings
Go to Battery settings to disable battery optimizations for reliable notifications
Allow notifications
To receive episode and error notifications, go to Settings and allow them
Allow on-time notifications
To receive notifications on time, go to Settings and allow setting reminders
小芯泻褉懈褬 胁械褱械 谐谢械写邪薪懈 械锌懈蟹芯写懈

Note that the number of items is always limited to save resources

Free trial
Try for 30 days, cancel any time.
Every subscription unlocks all features and supports future updates. A subscription is not required to use this app.
袙懈 斜谢邪谐芯写邪褉懈屑械 蟹邪 锌芯写写褉褕泻邪褌邪 SeriesGuide! 袙懈械 懈屑邪褌械 锌褉懈褋褌邪锌 写芯 褋懈褌械 褎褍薪泻褑懈懈.

string.name: billing_unlock_detected
string.comment: Detailed message shown if all features are unlocked by the (legacy) in-app purchase or the unlock app.

resources.string: All Access Pass detected. You may still subscribe to support future updates.
More info and help

string.name: subscription_expired_details
string.comment: Brief message shown if there is an issue with the subscription (e.g. it has expired) or the unlock app was uninstalled.

resources.string: Access to all features expired

Purchase
Rental

string.name: auth_action_back
string.comment: Action to go back

resources.string: Back

string.name: auth_message_privacy_policy
string.comment: Privacy policy message, the placeholder will use the label for privacy_policy

resources.string: When you use this feature, additional data is processed as described in the %1$s.

string.name: auth_message_new_accounts_disabled
string.comment: Message shown when creating new accounts is not allowed

resources.string: Creating new accounts is currently not allowed

string.name: auth_action_sign_in_with_google
string.comment: Action to sign in with a Google account

resources.string: Sign in with Google

string.name: auth_action_sign_in_with_email
string.comment: Action to sign in with an email address

resources.string: Sign in with email

string.name: auth_action_continue_with_google
string.comment: Action to continue signing in with a suggested Google account

resources.string: Continue with Google

string.name: auth_action_continue_with_email
string.comment: Action to continue signing in with a suggested email address

resources.string: Continue with email

string.name: auth_hint_name
string.comment: Hint for name input field

resources.string: Your name

string.name: auth_hint_email
string.comment: Hint for email input field

resources.string: Email

string.name: auth_hint_password
string.comment: Hint for password input field

resources.string: Password

string.name: auth_hint_confirm_password
string.comment: Hint for confirm password input field

resources.string: Confirm Password

string.name: auth_hint_confirm_password_does_not_match
string.comment: Hint when password entered in confirm password field does not match

resources.string: Passwords do not match

string.name: auth_hint_required
string.comment: Hint that the value of an input field is required

resources.string: Required

string.name: auth_hint_email_required
string.comment: Hint that a valid email address is required in an input field

resources.string: Valid email address required

string.name: auth_action_sign_up
string.comment: Action to create an account

resources.string: Create an account

string.name: auth_error_email_alreay_in_use
string.comment: Error message when signing up with a used email address

resources.string: This email address is already in use by an existing account. Sign in with this email address instead.

string.name: auth_action_show_password
string.comment: Action to show the password in a text field

resources.string: Show password

string.name: auth_error_weak_password
string.comment: Error message when password does not meet requirements

resources.string: Password not strong enough

string.name: auth_error_password_too_short
string.comment: Error message when password is too short

resources.string: Use at least %1$d characters

string.name: auth_action_reset_password
string.comment: Action to reset password

resources.string: Reset password

string.name: auth_title_reset_password_instructions
string.comment: Title of reset password instructions

resources.string: Check your email

string.name: auth_message_reset_password_instructions
string.comment: Reset password instructions

resources.string: If an account for this email address exists, an email with instructions to reset your password was sent to it.

string.name: auth_error_account_linking_required
string.comment: Error message when account exists, but created with different sign-in method

resources.string: An account was already created for this email address using a different sign-in method. Sign in using the original method to add this one.

string.name: auth_error_no_google_account_available
string.comment: Error message when trying to sign in with Google but no Google accounts are available on the device

resources.string: No Google account is available on this device. Sign in using email or add a Google account to this device.

string.name: auth_error_unknown
string.comment: General error messages for an unknown failure.

resources.string: An unknown error occurred

string.name: auth_error_invalid_password
string.comment: Error message for when signing in fails.

resources.string: This password is incorrect, this account does not support signing in with a password or there is no account with this email address. Maybe reset your password.
